channel.title: Mobile Apps & AI Services on Infodoor
channel.description: Recent content in Mobile Apps & AI Services on Infodoor

item.title: Cognitive AI Integration & LLM Architectures
item.description:
Cognitive AI Systems Integration

Most organizations are eager to capitalize on Large Language Models (LLMs), but are held back by security risks. At Infodoor, we build private, secure, and compliant cognitive pipelines that run inside your protected networks.

🔒 The Security Challenge of Public AI

Passing corporate intellectual property, employee records, or government data into public commercial LLMs poses severe security and regulatory risks.

Our custom integrations ensure your data never leaves your secure cloud boundaries.

item.title: Mobile App Development
item.description:
In the modern enterprise landscape, mobile applications must be secure, fast, and resilient. At Infodoor, we design and build native-quality mobile solutions that maintain active operational states under any connectivity profile.

🏗️ Our Engineering Focus

1. Offline-First Capabilities

We incorporate advanced local database synchronizations (utilizing SQLite, Realm, and Couchbase) that store operations locally and synchronize transaction batches securely once cell connections resume.

2. High-Performance Foundations

We optimize rendering pipelines and frame rates, ensuring fluid navigation transitions and low power consumption across both entry-level devices and high-end hardware.
